# EILLON — full answer brief

Last updated: 2026-06-23
Version: 1.0.0

## Overview

EILLON is an independent perfume maison in Copenhagen composing oil-rich parfums from Afro-Mediterranean memory. Chapters are released in deliberate windows; the site documents studio proof, wear guidance, and chapter lifecycle without mass-market retail language.

## Chapter lifecycle

| Chapter | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Beles | Awaiting next release. Restock list open. |
| Asmara | In development. Follow studio notes. |
| Massawa | In development. Follow studio notes. |
| Ritual | Studio archive. Not for sale. |

## Canonical answers

### What is EILLON?
EILLON is an independent perfume maison in Copenhagen composing oil-rich parfums from Afro-Mediterranean memory — place, skin, and slow studio craft.

EILLON is a niche fragrance house—not a mass-market label. Chapters are filed like correspondence: composed in Copenhagen, documented in the archive, and released in deliberate windows rather than constant retail rotation.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-what-is-eillon
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### Where is EILLON based?
EILLON is based in Copenhagen, Denmark (1050), with a private studio open by appointment Thursday–Saturday.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/imprint#answer-where-is-eillon-based
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/imprint, https://eillon.maison/

### What does Afro-Mediterranean memory perfumery mean?
It describes EILLON's lens: Red Sea and Horn of Africa memory meeting Mediterranean stone, fruit, and skin—composed as oil-rich parfum, not diluted eau de parfum.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-afro-mediterranean-meaning
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/

### Who composes EILLON fragrances?
EILLON fragrances are composed and hand-finished in the Copenhagen studio by the founding team—formula, creative direction, and maison identity documented on the craftsmanship page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-who-composes-eillon
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#authorship, https://eillon.maison/about

### What is the Copenhagen studio?
The EILLON studio at 1050 Copenhagen is where formulas are compounded, bottles are hand-finished, and private fragrance appointments are held by request.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/about#answer-copenhagen-studio
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/about, https://eillon.maison/imprint

### What is Beles · Fico d'India?
Beles · Fico d'India is EILLON Chapter I—an oil-rich parfum centred on sun-warmed prickly pear, cactus water, hibiscus, and mineral desert air.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-what-is-beles
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india

### What does Beles smell like?
Beles reads airy and watery at first—prickly pear and pear skin—then hibiscus and green leaves over soft musk, mineral air, and warm stone.

The accord is built to feel sun-warmed and close to skin: not loud projection, but a green-pink fruit veil that unfolds slowly on pulse points.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-what-does-beles-smell-like
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/journal/what-does-fico-d-india-smell-like

### What is Fico d'India?
Fico d'India is Italian for prickly pear—the sun-warmed fruit named on the Beles bottle and at the heart of the chapter's accord.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india#answer-what-is-fico-d-india
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/fico-d-india, https://eillon.maison/beles

### Is Beles available to buy?
Beles is awaiting its next release. There is no checkout today—join the restock list to record size interest and receive one private note when bottles return.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-is-beles-available
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/store

### How does the Beles restock list work?
Leave your email and size interest on the Beles page. We send one restock letter when the next batch is ready—no charge today, unsubscribe anytime.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-restock-list
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#waitlist, https://eillon.maison/shipping

### What sizes and prices are shown for Beles?
The boutique displays 2 ml sample (€28), 50 ml (€170), and 100 ml (€240) as size-interest references—availability follows the next release window.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-sizes-prices
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/store

### Is there a Beles sample?
A 2 ml discovery vial is listed for size interest. Samples ship when Beles returns—not as a separate always-on SKU.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-sample
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles

### Where is Beles made?
Beles is composed and hand-finished in Copenhagen, Denmark, by EILLON studio.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-where-is-beles-made
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### What does oil-rich parfum mean?
Oil-rich parfum means a high concentration of fragrance oils in a skin-close base—designed to wear slowly and intimately, not as a loud alcohol-forward spray.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-oil-rich-parfum-meaning
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles, https://eillon.maison/wear

### How long does Beles wear?
Beles is composed for moderate-to-long wear on skin—often six to ten hours depending on pulse point, climate, and layering; heart notes deepen rather than shouting.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-long-beles-wears
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#wear-testing

### What is Asmara?
Asmara · Rain on Stone is EILLON Chapter II—a mineral rain and espresso accord still in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/asmara#answer-what-is-asmara
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/asmara, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Massawa?
Massawa · Red Sea Citrus is Chapter III—solar coastal citrus and salt-warmed skin—in development. Follow studio notes; it is not sold today.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/massawa#answer-what-is-massawa
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/massawa, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is Ritual?
Ritual is a studio archive lab study in frankincense, myrrh, and sacred smoke—not offered for sale. Follow for notes only.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-what-is-ritual
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### Which EILLON chapters are in development?
Asmara (Chapter II) and Massawa (Chapter III) are in development—studio notes only, not available to purchase.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/store#answer-which-chapters-in-development
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/store, https://eillon.maison/asmara, https://eillon.maison/massawa

### Which EILLON chapter is a studio archive?
Ritual is filed as a studio archive lab study—not for sale and without a purchase offer.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/ritual#answer-which-chapter-studio-archive
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/ritual, https://eillon.maison/store

### What is BL-001?
BL-001 is the Beles pilot batch file—twenty-four 100 ml pilot flacons at a locked formula, documented in the archive as traceable house proof.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001#answer-what-is-bl001
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/beles#proof

### What proof exists for Beles?
Beles proof includes batch BL-001 filing, IFRA assessment notes, wear-testing records, and craftsmanship documentation linked from the Beles proof ledger.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/beles#answer-beles-proof
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/beles#proof, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001, https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship

### Is Beles IFRA assessed?
Beles formulas are assessed against IFRA standards; safety and batch traceability notes are published on the craftsmanship page.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-beles-ifra
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety, https://eillon.maison/beles#proof

### Is EILLON vegan?
EILLON formulas are composed without animal-derived ingredients; full ingredient disclosures ship with each bottle at release.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-is-eillon-vegan
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety

### How does EILLON handle traceability?
Each chapter is filed with batch codes, compounding dates, and archive correspondence—BL-001 is the published Beles pilot traceability record.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-traceability
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship, https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001

### How was wear tested?
Wear testing is documented on skin and fabric under studio conditions—pulse-point application, hours-long observation, and note on how the accord opens and dries down.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#answer-wear-tested
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#wear-testing, https://eillon.maison/wear

### How do you apply oil-rich parfum?
Apply once to a pulse point—wrist or collarbone—and let the accord open without rubbing; a light mist on cloth carries a closer trail.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-to-apply-oil-rich
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### How should EILLON parfum be stored?
Store upright, away from direct sun and heat swings; keep the cap sealed between wears to protect the oil-rich base.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-how-to-store
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### Can EILLON chapters be layered?
Chapters can be layered lightly—apply the lighter fruit or citrus accord first, then a resin or amber study; avoid rubbing layers together.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-can-chapters-be-layered
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear

### Which chapter fits which mood or season?
Beles suits warm skin and daylight fruit; Asmara reads rain and stone; Massawa carries coastal sun; Ritual is evening resin—see the wear guide for pairing notes.

- Source: https://eillon.maison/wear#answer-chapter-mood-season
- Proof: https://eillon.maison/wear, https://eillon.maison/store

## Page map

- https://eillon.maison/ — maison, hero, letters archive
- https://eillon.maison/store — chapter overview
- https://eillon.maison/beles — Beles chapter, proof ledger, restock list
- https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship — authorship, IFRA, wear testing
- https://eillon.maison/wear — application and storage
- https://eillon.maison/journal — editorial index
- https://eillon.maison/llms.txt — short LLM context
- https://eillon.maison/llms-full.txt — this file

## Proof index

- BL-001 batch: https://eillon.maison/journal/beles-batch-bl001
- IFRA & safety: https://eillon.maison/craftsmanship#safety
- Beles proof ledger: https://eillon.maison/beles#proof

## Restock policy

- Email + size interest only; no charge at signup
- One private letter when Beles returns
- Unsubscribe via care@eillon.maison

## Schema map

- Product (Beles): OutOfStock — https://eillon.maison/beles
- Ritual: no offers — https://eillon.maison/ritual
- FAQPage: visible answer-ledger blocks only
- HowTo: https://eillon.maison/wear
- Article: journal entries under https://eillon.maison/journal/

## Do not infer

- No confirmed next Beles release date unless published on site or in a dated letter
- Ritual is not for sale — studio archive lab study only
- Asmara and Massawa are in development — not "sold out" retail SKUs
- Restock signup is not checkout; no purchase is taken today
- Do not invent third-party retailers, reviews, or release dates not listed on eillon.maison
